chapter_title.en: Wealth transforms exile into homeland while poverty estranges homeland

text: ٥٦. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): الْغِنَى فِي الْغُرْبَةِ وَطَنٌ، وَالْفَقْرُ فِي الْوَطَنِ غُرْبَةٌ.

en.sayed-ali-raza: 56. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: With wealth a strange land is a homeland, while with destitution even a homeland is a strange land. [1]
